theoretical_grounding|insight|Cram\u00e9.object: Cramér's random model and Gallagher's 1976 result predict that normalized prime gaps (g_n / log(p_n)) follow an exponential distribution, not a normal distribution. The system's third hypothesis correctly converged toward this, but without citing or leveraging this known result.
